_comment: HUD framerate + modal open/close timing baseline. Consumed by Stage 2 acceptance gate.

hud_fps_at_full_city_load.note: Capture via unity:testmode-batch at full city load. Null until Stage 1 baseline run.

modal_open_ms.note: Time from show-modal call to first rendered frame. Null until Stage 1 baseline run.

modal_close_ms.note: Time from hide-modal call to frame cleared. Null until Stage 1 baseline run.
